transliterations.transliteration: tāi Poo tsio̍h hûn hong Pak hiunn
daai6 bou3 daam3/sek6 wan4 fung1 baak1/bak1 hoeng1/hoeng3
dà bù shí yún fēng běi xiāng

text.transcription: 顯(考文宗>謚厚直羅公/妣氏玉>諱勤助劉氏)佳城

transliterations.transliteration: hián khó Bûn tsong 謚 hōo ti̍t/buē Lô Kong pí sī gio̍k 諱 khîn tsōo 劉 sī kha Siânn
hin2 haau2 man4/man6 zung1 si3 hau5 zik6 lo4 gung1 bei2 si6/zi1 juk6 wai5 kan4 zo6 lau4 si6/zi1 gaai1 seng4/sing4
xiǎn kǎo wén zōng shì hòu zhí luó gōng bǐ shì yù huì qín zhù liú shì jiā chéng

normalization.div: 顯考文宗謚厚直羅公佳城
